summary: Expanded blind-box item authoring from the three-pilot four-pool model to all 20 scene-plus-purpose categories.
Preserved runtime BLIND_BOXES shape with name, large, medium, small, and hanging buckets.
Mapped large from core_items plus scene_expansion_items, medium from support_items plus core_items:first_6, small from visible_small_items, and hanging as an empty compatibility bucket.
Preserved runtime ids 1-20 for comma input and draw_history key compatibility while documenting that their semantic content now follows the new scene-plus-purpose catalog.
Removed the legacy static BLIND_BOXES source data so extraction items now come directly from the new four-pool content.
Expanded regression tests from pilot-only coverage to full-library coverage and asserted that BLIND_BOXES contains only the new 20 runtime ids.
Synchronized required docs: agents.md, README.md, Game content extraction/CLAUDE.md, Game content extraction/README.md, and .gitignore.
validation_performed: python -B -m py_compile 'Game content extraction\内容抽取.py' 'Game content extraction\data\blind_boxes.py'
python -B -m py_compile 'Game content extraction\内容抽取.py'
python -B -m py_compile 'Game content extraction\image_fetcher_ui.py' 'Game content extraction\file_batch_renamer.py'
remaining_risks: Content quality still benefits from manual sampling after real prompt use, especially for the 17 categories expanded beyond the original three pilots.
